title: Global Course Evaluation
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Global Course Evaluation
Courses taken at study away locations can be used to fulfill the following requirement:
Core Curriculum Requirement
Core Curriculum Requirement
Major Requirements
Major Requirements
Shanghai Minor Requirements
Shanghai Minor Requirements
Students are encouraged to take courses that are approved on the Global Courses Satisfying Shanghai Degree Requirement. If the course information is not listed, you may request a course evaluation.
Students can only request one course to be evaluated at a time. If you have more than one course that needs to be evaluated, please submit a separate form for each course.
Syllabus
For courses at study away locations, students need to contact the instructor to acquire a syllabus.
Processing Times
The evaluation process will take one month. Students will be notified via email about the evaluation result.
Information for Advisors [Log-in Required]
